name: Zero Risk — Cliente Nuevo · Landing Cascade Master

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ ({ name: $node['Validate Payload'].json.client_name, slug: $node['Validate Payload'].json.slug, industry: $node['Validate Payload'].json.industry, country: $node['Validate Payload'].json.country, logo_url: ($node['Validate Payload'].json.brand_assets && $node['Validate Payload'].json.brand_assets.logo_url) || null, brand_colors: ($node['Validate Payload'].json.brand_assets && $node['Validate Payload'].json.brand_assets.colors) || null, brand_fonts: ($node['Validate Payload'].json.brand_assets && $node['Validate Payload'].json.brand_assets.fonts) || null }) }}

={{ ({ agent: 'brand-strategist', task: 'Cliente: ' + $node['Validate Payload'].json.client_name + ' (industry=' + $node['Validate Payload'].json.industry + ', location=' + ($node['Validate Payload'].json.location || 'n/a') + '). Diferenciador: ' + ($node['Validate Payload'].json.diferenciador || 'n/a') + '. Products: ' + ($node['Validate Payload'].json.products || 'n/a') + '. Brand assets · USE VERBATIM. Logo: ' + (($node['Validate Payload'].json.brand_assets && $node['Validate Payload'].json.brand_assets.logo_url) || 'none') + '. Brand colors HEX: ' + (($node['Validate Payload'].json.brand_assets && $node['Validate Payload'].json.brand_assets.colors) || []).join(', ') + '. Brand fonts: ' + (($node['Validate Payload'].json.brand_assets && $node['Validate Payload'].json.brand_assets.fonts) || []).join(', ') + '. Scrape: ' + ($node['Validate Payload'].json.scrape_summary || 'none').substring(0, 600) + '. Task: brand book. Return strict JSON keys positioning_statement, brand_voice, values, tagline_options, target_audience_summary, do_say, dont_say. No prose outside JSON.', client_id: $node['Persist Client · UPSERT'].json.id || $node['Persist Client · UPSERT'].json.client_id, caller: 'n8n-cliente-nuevo-landing-cascade-master' }) }}

={{ ({ agent: 'market_research_analyst', task: 'Cliente: ' + $node['Validate Payload'].json.client_name + ' (' + $node['Validate Payload'].json.industry + ', ' + ($node['Validate Payload'].json.country || '') + ', ' + ($node['Validate Payload'].json.location || '') + '). [brand] ' + (($node['Agent · brand-strategist'].json && $node['Agent · brand-strategist'].json.response) || '').substring(0, 2500) + '. Task: 2-4 priority personas. Return strict JSON key personas array of {name, age_range, demographics, pain_points, decision_criteria, preferred_channels, trigger_to_order}. No prose outside JSON.', client_id: $node['Persist Client · UPSERT'].json.id || $node['Persist Client · UPSERT'].json.client_id, caller: 'n8n-cliente-nuevo-landing-cascade-master' }) }}

={{ ({ agent: 'creative-director', task: 'Cliente: ' + $node['Validate Payload'].json.client_name + '. Brand assets USE VERBATIM. Logo: ' + (($node['Validate Payload'].json.brand_assets && $node['Validate Payload'].json.brand_assets.logo_url) || 'none') + '. Colors HEX (palette_top5 MUST start with these): ' + (($node['Validate Payload'].json.brand_assets && $node['Validate Payload'].json.brand_assets.colors) || []).join(', ') + '. Fonts: ' + (($node['Validate Payload'].json.brand_assets && $node['Validate Payload'].json.brand_assets.fonts) || []).join(', ') + '. [brand] ' + (($node['Agent · brand-strategist'].json && $node['Agent · brand-strategist'].json.response) || '').substring(0, 1500) + '. [research] ' + (($node['Agent · market_research_analyst'].json && $node['Agent · market_research_analyst'].json.response) || '').substring(0, 1500) + '. Task: visual direction. Return strict JSON keys palette_top5 (array {hex, name}), imagery_style, mood, hero_image_prompt, visual_direction_summary. No prose outside JSON.', client_id: $node['Persist Client · UPSERT'].json.id || $node['Persist Client · UPSERT'].json.client_id, caller: 'n8n-cliente-nuevo-landing-cascade-master' }) }}

={{ ({ agent: 'web-designer', task: 'Cliente: ' + $node['Validate Payload'].json.client_name + '. [brand] ' + (($node['Agent · brand-strategist'].json && $node['Agent · brand-strategist'].json.response) || '').substring(0, 1200) + '. [research] ' + (($node['Agent · market_research_analyst'].json && $node['Agent · market_research_analyst'].json.response) || '').substring(0, 1200) + '. [creative] ' + (($node['Agent · creative-director'].json && $node['Agent · creative-director'].json.response) || '').substring(0, 1500) + '. Task: section architecture. Return strict JSON keys sections (array {name, purpose, primary_cta, content_blocks}), navigation, primary_cta_global, performance_priorities. Reference client-sites-toolkit. No prose outside JSON.', client_id: $node['Persist Client · UPSERT'].json.id || $node['Persist Client · UPSERT'].json.client_id, caller: 'n8n-cliente-nuevo-landing-cascade-master' }) }}

={{ ({ agent: 'content-creator', task: 'Cliente: ' + $node['Validate Payload'].json.client_name + ' (' + $node['Validate Payload'].json.industry + ') WhatsApp ' + ($node['Validate Payload'].json.whatsapp || 'n/a') + '. [brand] ' + (($node['Agent · brand-strategist'].json && $node['Agent · brand-strategist'].json.response) || '').substring(0, 1000) + '. [research] ' + (($node['Agent · market_research_analyst'].json && $node['Agent · market_research_analyst'].json.response) || '').substring(0, 1000) + '. [creative] ' + (($node['Agent · creative-director'].json && $node['Agent · creative-director'].json.response) || '').substring(0, 1200) + '. [web] ' + (($node['Agent · web-designer'].json && $node['Agent · web-designer'].json.response) || '').substring(0, 1200) + '. Task: write all UI strings. Return strict JSON keys hero {headline, subheadline, cta_text}, menu {section_title, items}, about {title, body}, contact {title, whatsapp_cta, hours_label}, footer. No prose outside JSON.', client_id: $node['Persist Client · UPSERT'].json.id || $node['Persist Client · UPSERT'].json.client_id, caller: 'n8n-cliente-nuevo-landing-cascade-master' }) }}

={{ ({ agent: 'spell-check-corrector', task: 'Cliente: ' + $node['Validate Payload'].json.client_name + '. [content] ' + (($node['Agent · content-creator (marketing)'].json && $node['Agent · content-creator (marketing)'].json.response) || '').substring(0, 3000) + '. Task: orthographic + grammar pass. Auto-apply ONLY high-confidence fixes. Return strict JSON keys corrections (array), corrected_copy, flagged_for_review (array), language_detected (es|en|mixed), summary. No prose outside JSON.', client_id: $node['Persist Client · UPSERT'].json.id || $node['Persist Client · UPSERT'].json.client_id, caller: 'n8n-cliente-nuevo-landing-cascade-master' }) }}

={{ ({ agent: 'editor-en-jefe', task: 'Cliente: ' + $node['Validate Payload'].json.client_name + '. FINAL QA. [brand] ' + (($node['Agent · brand-strategist'].json && $node['Agent · brand-strategist'].json.response) || '').substring(0, 700) + '. [research] ' + (($node['Agent · market_research_analyst'].json && $node['Agent · market_research_analyst'].json.response) || '').substring(0, 700) + '. [creative] ' + (($node['Agent · creative-director'].json && $node['Agent · creative-director'].json.response) || '').substring(0, 700) + '. [web] ' + (($node['Agent · web-designer'].json && $node['Agent · web-designer'].json.response) || '').substring(0, 700) + '. [content] ' + (($node['Agent · content-creator (marketing)'].json && $node['Agent · content-creator (marketing)'].json.response) || '').substring(0, 1000) + '. [spellcheck] ' + (($node['Agent · spell-check-corrector (Haiku)'].json && $node['Agent · spell-check-corrector (Haiku)'].json.response) || '').substring(0, 800) + '. Task: final QA semantic + brand + strategic review (spell-check has already passed). Return strict JSON with keys verdict (approved|revision_needed|escalated), severity (low|medium|high|critical), strengths (array), concerns (array), recommended_fixes (array). No prose outside the JSON. Camino III auto-fires inside /api/agents/run.', client_id: $node['Persist Client · UPSERT'].json.id || $node['Persist Client · UPSERT'].json.client_id, caller: 'n8n-cliente-nuevo-landing-cascade-master' }) }}

={{ ({ agent: 'style-consistency-reviewer', task: 'Cliente: ' + $node['Validate Payload'].json.client_name + '. Cross-output coherence audit. [brand] ' + (($node['Agent · brand-strategist'].json && $node['Agent · brand-strategist'].json.response) || '').substring(0, 800) + '. [research] ' + (($node['Agent · market_research_analyst'].json && $node['Agent · market_research_analyst'].json.response) || '').substring(0, 800) + '. [creative] ' + (($node['Agent · creative-director'].json && $node['Agent · creative-director'].json.response) || '').substring(0, 800) + '. [web] ' + (($node['Agent · web-designer'].json && $node['Agent · web-designer'].json.response) || '').substring(0, 800) + '. [content] ' + (($node['Agent · content-creator (marketing)'].json && $node['Agent · content-creator (marketing)'].json.response) || '').substring(0, 1000) + '. Task: score 4 axes (tone_alignment, vocabulary_harmony, voice_fidelity, pov_consistency) each 0-100. Return strict JSON with keys axis_scores, drift_findings (array), overall_score (0-100), recommended_action (approve|minor_fixes|major_revision). No prose outside the JSON.', client_id: $node['Persist Client · UPSERT'].json.id || $node['Persist Client · UPSERT'].json.client_id, caller: 'n8n-cliente-nuevo-landing-cascade-master' }) }}

={{ ({ agent: 'delivery-coordinator', task: 'Cliente: ' + $node['Validate Payload'].json.client_name + '. Final shippability gate. [editor] ' + (($node['Agent · editor-en-jefe (Camino III)'].json && $node['Agent · editor-en-jefe (Camino III)'].json.response) || '').substring(0, 2000) + '. [style] ' + (($node['Agent · style-consistency-reviewer (Gap 4)'].json && $node['Agent · style-consistency-reviewer (Gap 4)'].json.response) || '').substring(0, 2000) + '. Task: 7-check audit (brand_guardrails, copy_consistency, visual_harmony, cta_clarity, mobile_intent, accessibility_floor, locale_sanity). Return strict JSON with keys checks (object of 7 booleans + per-check notes), overall_status (ship|return_to_producer|escalate_to_hitl), blockers (array), recommendations (array). No prose outside the JSON.', client_id: $node['Persist Client · UPSERT'].json.id || $node['Persist Client · UPSERT'].json.client_id, caller: 'n8n-cliente-nuevo-landing-cascade-master' }) }}

={{ (function() { let prompt = 'Hero landing image for ' + $node['Validate Payload'].json.client_name + ' (' + $node['Validate Payload'].json.industry + '). Brand colors HEX (use these): ' + (($node['Validate Payload'].json.brand_assets && $node['Validate Payload'].json.brand_assets.colors) || []).join(', ') + '. Style guidance from creative-director: ' + (($node['Agent · creative-director'].json && $node['Agent · creative-director'].json.response) || '').substring(0, 1500); try { const c = JSON.parse((($node['Agent · creative-director'].json && $node['Agent · creative-director'].json.response) || '{}').replace(/^```json\s*/, '').replace(/```\s*$/, '')); if (c && c.hero_image_prompt) { prompt = c.hero_image_prompt + ' Brand colors HEX (use these palette): ' + (($node['Validate Payload'].json.brand_assets && $node['Validate Payload'].json.brand_assets.colors) || []).join(', '); } } catch (e) {} return { prompt: prompt, client_id: $node['Persist Client · UPSERT'].json.id || $node['Persist Client · UPSERT'].json.client_id, agent_slug: 'creative-director', size: '1024x1024', caller: 'n8n-cliente-nuevo-landing-cascade-master' }; })() }}

={{ ({ client_id: $node['Persist Client · UPSERT'].json.id || $node['Persist Client · UPSERT'].json.client_id, slug: $node['Validate Payload'].json.slug, version: 'v2', task_id: $node['Validate Payload'].json.task_id, outputs: { brand: $node['Agent · brand-strategist'].json, research: $node['Agent · market_research_analyst'].json, creative: $node['Agent · creative-director'].json, web: $node['Agent · web-designer'].json, content: $node['Agent · content-creator (marketing)'].json, spellcheck: $node['Agent · spell-check-corrector (Haiku)'].json, editor: $node['Agent · editor-en-jefe (Camino III)'].json, style: $node['Agent · style-consistency-reviewer (Gap 4)'].json, delivery: $node['Agent · delivery-coordinator (Gap 5)'].json, hero: $node['Hero · GPT Image (post-delivery)'].json, scrape: $node['Apify · Instagram Scrape'].json } }) }}

={{ ({ slug: $node['Validate Payload'].json.slug, version: 'v2', source_image_url: ($node['Hero · GPT Image (post-delivery)'].json && $node['Hero · GPT Image (post-delivery)'].json.image_url) || null }) }}

={{ ({ text: '[FROM-N8N] [CLIENTE-NUEVO-LANDING-CASCADE-COMPLETE] · client=' + $node['Validate Payload'].json.client_name + ' · slug=' + $node['Validate Payload'].json.slug + ' · task_id=' + $node['Validate Payload'].json.task_id + ' · editor_verdict=' + (($node['Agent · editor-en-jefe (Camino III)'].json && $node['Agent · editor-en-jefe (Camino III)'].json.response) ? 'see-payload' : 'pending') + ' · delivery_status=' + (($node['Agent · delivery-coordinator (Gap 5)'].json && $node['Agent · delivery-coordinator (Gap 5)'].json.response) ? 'see-payload' : 'pending') + ' · hero=' + (($node['Hero · GPT Image (post-delivery)'].json && $node['Hero · GPT Image (post-delivery)'].json.image_url) ? 'generated' : 'failed') + ' · outputs at client-websites/' + $node['Validate Payload'].json.slug + '/v2/' }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ ({ ok: true, task_id: $node['Validate Payload'].json.task_id, client_id: $node['Persist Client · UPSERT'].json.id, slug: $node['Validate Payload'].json.slug, version: 'v2', outputs_path: 'client-websites/' + $node['Validate Payload'].json.slug + '/v2/', editor_verdict_present: !!($node['Agent · editor-en-jefe (Camino III)'].json && $node['Agent · editor-en-jefe (Camino III)'].json.response), delivery_status_present: !!($node['Agent · delivery-coordinator (Gap 5)'].json && $node['Agent · delivery-coordinator (Gap 5)'].json.response), style_review_present: !!($node['Agent · style-consistency-reviewer (Gap 4)'].json && $node['Agent · style-consistency-reviewer (Gap 4)'].json.response), hero_generated: !!($node['Hero · GPT Image (post-delivery)'].json && $node['Hero · GPT Image (post-delivery)'].json.image_url), hero_v2_path: ($node['Hero · Copy to v2/hero.png'].json && $node['Hero · Copy to v2/hero.png'].json.path) || null }) }}
